summary: Iteration 274: FFmpeg MP4 Video Export Fix VERIFIED. Fixed the 'Cannot find module' error by replacing ESM core files with UMD core files in /app/frontend/public/ffmpeg-core/. FFmpeg MP4 export now works successfully - produced 0.6MB video in ~65 seconds. MediaRecorder WebM fallback continues to work as regression test backup.
critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE: The public/ffmpeg-core/ folder had ESM files (import.meta.url) instead of UMD files (document.currentScript). ESM modules fail to load in Worker contexts.
FIX APPLIED: Copied UMD files from node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/umd/ to public/ffmpeg-core/
VERIFIED: FFmpeg MP4 export now works - 'ffmpeg loaded' message appears in console
VERIFIED: Download button shows 'Download MP4 (0.6MB)' confirming correct format
VERIFIED: MediaRecorder WebM fallback still works (regression test passed)
VERIFIED: Backend asset proxy endpoint working correctly
VERIFIED: All 3 scenes rendered via FFmpeg
NOTE: CSP warnings for blob: media sources and cloudflare scripts are cosmetic - do not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: None - used existing completed job 'Desert Oasis'
context_for_next_testing_agent: FFmpeg MP4 video export is now working correctly. The fix was to use UMD core files instead of ESM files. Key data-testids: browser-export-toggle-btn, start-export-btn, exported-video-player, download-exported-video. Export takes ~65 seconds for 3 scenes.

ffmpeg_mp4_export.details: FFmpeg MP4 export produces 0.6MB video in ~65 seconds for 3 scenes
ffmpeg_mp4_export.fix_applied: Replaced ESM core files with UMD core files

mediarecorder_webm_fallback.details: WebM fallback available if FFmpeg fails - produces 2.9MB video

download_button_format_label.details: Shows 'Download MP4' when FFmpeg path used, 'Download WebM' when fallback used

technical_details.issue: FFmpeg.wasm 0.12+ core files in public folder were ESM (import.meta.url) which fail in Worker contexts
technical_details.solution: Copy UMD files from node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/umd/ to public/ffmpeg-core/
